channel.title: friendly.atheist TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from friendly.atheist

item.title: Jackson Lahmeyer, a right-wing Christian Nationalist pastor, is about to announce a run for Congress. People need to know just how extreme he is. #ChristianNationalism #Atheism #Atheist #Politics #Religion
item.description: Jackson Lahmeyer, a right-wing Christian Nationalist pastor, is about to announce a run for Congress. People need to know just how extreme he is. #ChristianNationalism #Atheism #Atheist #Politics #Religion

item.title: Joseph Garrett Duggar was just arrested for what he did to a child... much like his older brother Joshua Duggar several years ago. This telegenic Christian family acted like Josh was just a bad apple, but it turns out the entire orchard is rotten. #Joseph
item.description: Joseph Garrett Duggar was just arrested for what he did to a child... much like his older brother Joshua Duggar several years ago. This telegenic Christian family acted like Josh was just a bad apple, but it turns out the entire orchard is rotten. #Joseph

item.title: Mark Robinson is the Christian Nationalist who ran for governor of North Carolina as a Republican in 2024. He now admits he lied when he denied all the awful allegations against him. Why? Because he felt a need to protect Donald Trump and didn't want to
item.description: Mark Robinson is the Christian Nationalist who ran for governor of North Carolina as a Republican in 2024. He now admits he lied when he denied all the awful allegations against him. Why? Because he felt a need to protect Donald Trump and didn't want to

item.title: Just days after her husband Joseph Duggar was charged with crimes against children, Kendra Duggar has been arrested for child endangerment. Joseph was hit was identical charges for this crime, unrelated to the previous one. At this point, wouldn't it be
item.description: Just days after her husband Joseph Duggar was charged with crimes against children, Kendra Duggar has been arrested for child endangerment. Joseph was hit was identical charges for this crime, unrelated to the previous one. At this point, wouldn't it be

item.title: For decades, the Jehovah's Witnesses have insisted members are forbidden from receiving blood transfusions, even in medical emergencies. But this week, they "clarified" the rule to say storing your OWN blood for a FUTURE transfusion is okay. Bottom line?
item.description: For decades, the Jehovah's Witnesses have insisted members are forbidden from receiving blood transfusions, even in medical emergencies. But this week, they "clarified" the rule to say storing your OWN blood for a FUTURE transfusion is okay. Bottom line?

item.title: The LDS Church just updated its official handbook to make clear that transgender members are second-class believers. From Temple access to participation in sacred rituals, the message is clear: conform or be excluded. Here’s what changed and why this ju
item.description: The LDS Church just updated its official handbook to make clear that transgender members are second-class believers. From Temple access to participation in sacred rituals, the message is clear: conform or be excluded. Here’s what changed and why this ju

item.title: Father Joseph Herzing and Father Aaron Kuhn, both of the St. Cloud Diocese in Minnesota, were charged with crimes involving an adult woman. Their lawyer now says charging them with crimes violates their religious freedom. But this isn't about their faith.
item.description: Father Joseph Herzing and Father Aaron Kuhn, both of the St. Cloud Diocese in Minnesota, were charged with crimes involving an adult woman. Their lawyer now says charging them with crimes violates their religious freedom. But this isn't about their faith.

item.title: Minnesota State Rep. Mary Franson told climate scientists she didn't care what they had to say about the effects of climate change because, as a Christian, she believed the whole thing was a hoax. It’s truly disturbing when the very people who have the po
item.description: Minnesota State Rep. Mary Franson told climate scientists she didn't care what they had to say about the effects of climate change because, as a Christian, she believed the whole thing was a hoax. It’s truly disturbing when the very people who have the po

item.title: Last year, the UK-based Bible Society released a bombshell report saying that young people in England and Wales were returning to church, reversing a downward trend we’d been seeing for decades. Critics were shocked and said these numbers didn’t make se

item.title: Last year, 14-year-old Danielle Khalaf sued her Michigan school district for punishing her for not standing during the Pledge of Allegiance. She wanted to peacefully protest what America and Israel were doing in Palestine. The district has now agreed to a
item.description: Last year, 14-year-old Danielle Khalaf sued her Michigan school district for punishing her for not standing during the Pledge of Allegiance. She wanted to peacefully protest what America and Israel were doing in Palestine. The district has now agreed to a

item.title: Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick just launched the "Senate Select Committee on Religious Liberty" to advance religious freedom throughout the state! Just one problem: The committee is STACKED with conservative Christians who have no desire to fight for the rel
item.description: Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick just launched the "Senate Select Committee on Religious Liberty" to advance religious freedom throughout the state! Just one problem: The committee is STACKED with conservative Christians who have no desire to fight for the rel

item.title: The Chicago Bulls just waived Jaden Ivey after controversial anti-Pride Month comments. But the real story isn’t about religion. Ivey, once a top draft pick, was already struggling on the court and coming off an injury. After being sidelined, he began pos

item.title: That’s enough internet for today… Turns out Kristi Noem’s husband has a big secret involving… well, you’ll see. #ChristianHypocrisy #KristiNoem #politics #atheism #Asymmetrical
item.description: That’s enough internet for today… Turns out Kristi Noem’s husband has a big secret involving… well, you’ll see. #ChristianHypocrisy #KristiNoem #politics #atheism #Asymmetrical

item.title: A group of Christian ministries thought they had the perfect setup: a friendly court, a willing IRS, and a chance to gut the Johnson Amendment so churches could openly endorse political candidates tax-free. Instead, a Trump-appointed judge slammed on the
item.description: A group of Christian ministries thought they had the perfect setup: a friendly court, a willing IRS, and a chance to gut the Johnson Amendment so churches could openly endorse political candidates tax-free. Instead, a Trump-appointed judge slammed on the

item.title: After nearly a decade of litigation, a federal judge ruled that the Ten Commandments monument outside the Arkansas State Capitol violates the Constitution and must come down. The ruling is a major win for church-state separation—and a reminder that religi
item.description: After nearly a decade of litigation, a federal judge ruled that the Ten Commandments monument outside the Arkansas State Capitol violates the Constitution and must come down. The ruling is a major win for church-state separation—and a reminder that religi

item.title: Texas Railroad Commissioner candidate Bo French, a MAGA Republican, is very mad at me for pointing out that a statewide “religious liberty” commission is a sham. He’s also mad that I’m Indian. #BoFrench #TexasPolitics #politics #christiannationalism #reli
item.description: Texas Railroad Commissioner candidate Bo French, a MAGA Republican, is very mad at me for pointing out that a statewide “religious liberty” commission is a sham. He’s also mad that I’m Indian. #BoFrench #TexasPolitics #politics #christiannationalism #reli

item.title: At a private White House Easter event, Trump’s spiritual adviser Paula White-Cain compared his legal struggles to the suffering of Jesus—and then the video was quickly deleted. But the internet never forgets... #PaulaWhite #ChristianNationalism #Politics
item.description: At a private White House Easter event, Trump’s spiritual adviser Paula White-Cain compared his legal struggles to the suffering of Jesus—and then the video was quickly deleted. But the internet never forgets... #PaulaWhite #ChristianNationalism #Politics

item.description: No Description

item.title: Gregg Phillips isn’t just some random conspiracy nut. He runs FEMA’s Office of Response and Recovery. That means when hurricanes hit or wildfires spread, he’s one of the people making life-or-death decisions. When called out, he blamed medication, then pi
item.description: Gregg Phillips isn’t just some random conspiracy nut. He runs FEMA’s Office of Response and Recovery. That means when hurricanes hit or wildfires spread, he’s one of the people making life-or-death decisions. When called out, he blamed medication, then pi

item.title: Donald Trump spent Easter morning crafting a message that conservative Catholics and white evangelical pastors would never read aloud in church. Don't sanewash this. Quote him verbatim. #Politics #ChristianNationalism #Easter #Religion #Atheism
item.description: Donald Trump spent Easter morning crafting a message that conservative Catholics and white evangelical pastors would never read aloud in church. Don't sanewash this. Quote him verbatim. #Politics #ChristianNationalism #Easter #Religion #Atheism

item.title: JD Vance is releasing a memoir about his conversion to Catholicism—but the lies begin right on the cover. Whether it’s sloppy, symbolic, or just pure branding, it raises a bigger question: How much of this story is real? Or is it all just for show? #JDVan
item.description: JD Vance is releasing a memoir about his conversion to Catholicism—but the lies begin right on the cover. Whether it’s sloppy, symbolic, or just pure branding, it raises a bigger question: How much of this story is real? Or is it all just for show? #JDVan

item.title: A California school district thought it signed a contract with an anti-bullying group. Turns out they actually hired a Christian ministry. Boomer Bennett openly admitted he was using a “cloak and dagger” strategy to access public schools and convert kids.
item.description: A California school district thought it signed a contract with an anti-bullying group. Turns out they actually hired a Christian ministry. Boomer Bennett openly admitted he was using a “cloak and dagger” strategy to access public schools and convert kids.

item.title: Yes, this is real. The Puppeteers of America group is apologizing after inviting the Fellowship of Christian Puppeteers, a group with strict anti-LGBTQ rules, to speak at a major event. #LGBTQRights #ReligiousFreedom #Theater #Atheism #Christianity
item.description: Yes, this is real. The Puppeteers of America group is apologizing after inviting the Fellowship of Christian Puppeteers, a group with strict anti-LGBTQ rules, to speak at a major event. #LGBTQRights #ReligiousFreedom #Theater #Atheism #Christianity

item.title: Texas education officials have given preliminary approval to a new public school reading list that includes significant Bible-related content. This is arguably illegal and it’s logistically impossible to implement. It’s a disaster waiting to happen. #Edu
item.description: Texas education officials have given preliminary approval to a new public school reading list that includes significant Bible-related content. This is arguably illegal and it’s logistically impossible to implement. It’s a disaster waiting to happen. #Edu

item.title: Donald Trump criticized the Pope over comments he made basically saying war is bad. Pope Leo warned against what he called a “delusion of omnipotence,” and Trump fired back, calling him weak and out of touch. Will all the religious conservatives in his pa
item.description: Donald Trump criticized the Pope over comments he made basically saying war is bad. Pope Leo warned against what he called a “delusion of omnipotence,” and Trump fired back, calling him weak and out of touch. Will all the religious conservatives in his pa

item.title: Donald Trump posted a bizarre fake image late Sunday night defying everything white evangelicals claim to value. When are they going to admit he's the problem and not the solution? #TenCommandments #ChristianNationalism #Atheism #Epstein #Blasphemy
item.description: Donald Trump posted a bizarre fake image late Sunday night defying everything white evangelicals claim to value. When are they going to admit he's the problem and not the solution? #TenCommandments #ChristianNationalism #Atheism #Epstein #Blasphemy

item.title: The New York Times just published an obituary for Ishmael Jaffree—nearly two years after his death. Jaffree challenged classroom prayer in Alabama and the Supreme Court agreed with him. His story might have gone largely unnoticed if not for the efforts o

item.title: When Franklin Graham was asked about Donald Trump sharing an AI image of himself as Jesus, he claimed Trump didn’t realize what the image depicted. Which is ridiculous. Of course he knew. But Graham is more interested in defending Trump than defending Je
item.description: When Franklin Graham was asked about Donald Trump sharing an AI image of himself as Jesus, he claimed Trump didn’t realize what the image depicted. Which is ridiculous. Of course he knew. But Graham is more interested in defending Trump than defending Je

item.title: During a sermon at a Pentagon Christian worship service, Pete Hegseth said he was reading a prayer inspired by Ezekiel 25:17. He ended up reading something that more closely resembled Samuel L. Jackson's character in Pulp Fiction. Because of course he di
item.description: During a sermon at a Pentagon Christian worship service, Pete Hegseth said he was reading a prayer inspired by Ezekiel 25:17. He ended up reading something that more closely resembled Samuel L. Jackson's character in Pulp Fiction. Because of course he di
